changeSet.author: MARKETING
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE meta_insights_snapshot ( id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
user_id BIGINT NOT NULL, provider VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, ad_account_id VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
object_type VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL, object_id VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
date_start DATE NOT NULL, date_stop DATE NOT NULL,
spend NUMERIC(12,2), impressions BIGINT, clicks BIGINT, ctr NUMERIC(12,6), cpc NUMERIC(12,6), cpm NUMERIC(12,6),
actions_json JSONB, cost_per_action_type_json JSONB, purchase_roas_json JSONB,
-- ✅ make dedupe columns normalized and NOT NULL date_preset VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', time_increment INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT -1, since DATE NOT NULL DEFAULT DATE '1970-01-01', until DATE NOT NULL DEFAULT DATE '1970-01-01',
created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
CONSTRAINT fk_meta_snapshot_user FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES USERS(ID),
-- ✅ real unique constraint (no COALESCE expressions) CONSTRAINT uq_meta_snapshot_unique UNIQUE ( user_id, provider, ad_account_id, object_type, object_id, date_start, date_stop, date_preset, time_increment, since, until ) );
CREATE INDEX idx_meta_snapshot_user_id ON meta_insights_snapshot(user_id); CREATE INDEX idx_meta_snapshot_account ON meta_insights_snapshot(ad_account_id); CREATE INDEX idx_meta_snapshot_object ON meta_insights_snapshot(object_type, object_id); CREATE INDEX idx_meta_snapshot_dates ON meta_insights_snapshot(date_start, date_stop); CREATE INDEX idx_meta_snapshot_created_at ON meta_insights_snapshot(created_at);
